race.comment: YOU SEXY THING (4) total forgive from the outside draw first-up, when snagged back before running on late with a respectable fifth over 1200m at Kembla Grange. Claim helps from the low gate and expected to go on with it this time in. SPIRITUALISTIC (7) won well two-back over this trip, then struggled to see the 1600m out with a tiring sixth as fav over 1600m at Nowra. Blinkers go on with the key jockey change. Each way. WOOTTON WAY (3) deep into the prep and ready for the extra ground in this easier contest. Gets in light with Grima's claim and will be ridden for luck from the draw. Solid top-three contender. CRIMSON WINGS (2) has disappointed in her two runs back and will be looking for an improving surface on the roomier Newcastle track. Keep safe.
